## Type of change

- [ ] feature
- [ ] protocol change (requires ADR + version bump)

## Verification

- [ ] `docker compose config -q` passes (if infra changed)
- [ ] JSON schemas compile (if `protocol/schema/*` changed)
- [ ] Smoke test passes locally (`./tools/smoke-test.sh`)
- [ ] Adapter conformance passes (if adapter changed)
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated
